ddls:
CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data entry */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the data is collected */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "ugb" TEXT /* Indicates if the city is in an Urban Growth Boundary (UGB) */,
  "one_unit" INTEGER /* Count of one-unit housing responses */,
  "two_units" INTEGER /* Count of two-unit housing responses */,
  "three_four_units" INTEGER /* Count of three or four-unit housing responses */,
  "five_nine_units" INTEGER /* Count of five to nine-unit housing responses */,
  "ten_nineteen_units" INTEGER /* Count of ten to nineteen-unit housing responses */,
  "twenty_forty_nine_units" INTEGER /* Count of twenty to forty-nine-unit housing responses */,
  "fifty_or_more_units" INTEGER /* Count of fifty or more unit housing responses */,
  "other_units" INTEGER /* Count of other unit types */,
  "total_responses" INTEGER /* Total count of housing responses */,
  "median_housing_cost" INTEGER /* Median cost of housing in the city */,
  "moe_housing_cost" INTEGER /* Margin of error for housing costs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the city */,
  "average_housing_cost" INTEGER /* Average cost of housing in the city */,
  "housing_affordability_index" INTEGER /* Index indicating the affordability of housing */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., census, survey) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the city in square kilometers */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the city */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in the city */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urban_growth_boundaries" (
  "ugb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UGB record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city associated with this UGB */,
  "ugb_status" TEXT /* Status of the UGB (e.g., Yes, No) */,
  "boundary_area" INTEGER /* Area of the UGB in square kilometers */,
  "year_established" INTEGER /* Year the UGB was established */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the UGB status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ugb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_urban_growth_boundaries_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the housing type (e.g., Single Unit, Multi-Unit) */,
  "average_cost" INTEGER /* Average cost of the housing type in the city */,
  "median_size" INTEGER /* Median size of the housing type in square feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the housing data entry */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments regarding the response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  "response_source" TEXT /* Source of the response (e.g., survey, census) */,
  "response_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the response (e.g., 0.95 for 95% accuracy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES housing_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
